name: Quick & Easy Rainbow Trout #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish in a greased baking dish.
2. Prepare the stuffing mix according to package directions.
3. Stuff the fish with the prepared stuffing.
4. Brush the fish with oil.
5. Cover the baking dish and bake at 425 degrees for 20-25 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily.
6. Serve with lemon wedges.
